notes: v0.16.13 — BASTION class playable + tank mechanics + leaderboard class tags. BASTION is now selectable and has its identity wired: NO dash, -35% speed, -25% fire rate, +60% HP, +10% damage per hit, 3 charged shield segments at spawn (cap 3, 8s recharge). New CLASS_BASE_STATS layer applied on top of skill tree + modules so class identity always wins — LANCE (glassy, slow charge shots, +45% damage) and CHORUS (medium HP, fast fire rate, low damage) also get their canon profiles. Boss Rush leaderboard rows now display the class + skin name that achieved each clear in class colour. Windows only.
